summary: One test exceeded its timeout threshold, completing in 1.014 seconds when the limit was 1.001 seconds. The test suite otherwise passed 1223 tests successfully.
root_cause: A test exceeded the 1.001 second timeout threshold by 13 milliseconds (actual runtime: 1.014 seconds). The case_id suggests this is related to pubsub channel timeout behavior.

evidence.reason: Indicates the failing test completed in 1.014 seconds
Explicitly states the test timed out after 1.001 seconds, establishing the timeout threshold
Shows exactly 1 test failed out of 1224 total tests run, with no other failures reported
Confirms the test.ci target failed with exit code 1 due to the timeout

suggested_fix: Increase the timeout threshold for this test, or investigate performance regressions in the pubsub channel timeout code path that is causing it to exceed the previous timeout margin
